decision.notes: Owner decision 2026-07-17 (recorded via agent session): re-render with observed-peak markers only. Model-corrected intrinsic-arrival markers (observed peak minus published Delta_scat) violate the 2026-07-14 data-only lock and consume wave-1 V1-revoked joint-fit kernels that the joint-tf lane has since diagnosed as RFI-contaminated (mask-unaware downsample; refits pending). A model-anchored variant may resubmit as a new batch only after V1 clearance + RFI-fixed refits + an explicit lock amendment; manifest pipeline_revision 4e951c8a must also match the submodule pin. ADDENDUM 2026-07-17T22:11:01+00:00 (owner): two further defects to clear before resubmission. (1) DM rendering still looks off in the gallery: the producer re-dedisperses each waterfall from its filename-stem DM to the adopted CHIME phase-coherence DM, so any product whose stem misstates the actually-applied DM (chromatica DSA 272.368-vs-272.664 precedent) leaves residual sweep. Resubmission must include a per-panel DM-provenance audit: measure the residual drift slope per panel and prove it consistent with zero at the adopted DM. (2) Frequency-index/orientation assignment is not trusted for all bursts (casey rendered upside-down until recently). Resubmission must validate each panel's frequency axis against the raw product headers (band edges + channel ordering) for both instruments, not assume a fixed ordering.

required_provenance: adopted DM and uncertainty for every burst
input waterfall path and SHA-256 for both telescopes
input-product DM and applied re-dedispersion offset
time/frequency resolution and mask summary
candidates.title: Figure 1: twelve-burst CHIME/FRB and DSA-110 gallery

decision.notes: Owner decision 2026-07-17 (recorded via coordination agent session): batch REJECTED wholesale as stale. Resubmission bar: regenerate at submodule-pin parity (5fb387e or later) from the post-refit products.

Diagnostics are 2026-07-14 renders from the DM-locked adjudication whose wave-1 kernels were since diagnosed RFI-contaminated; superseded by the merged 2L window campaign (dsa110-FLITS #192) and the owner-approved power-law-PBF model change (spec locked 2026-07-17) with pooled production refits pending. Resubmission bar: regenerate at submodule-pin parity (5fb387e or later) from the post-refit products.

required_provenance: adopted DM and input-product DM for both telescopes
exact joint-model artifact SHA-256 or explicit data-only status
display window, resolution, and masks
residual normalization and color scale
relationship to the approved Figure 1 layout

decision.notes: Owner decision 2026-07-17 (recorded via coordination agent session): batch REJECTED wholesale as stale. Diagnostics are 2026-07-14 renders from the DM-locked adjudication whose wave-1 kernels were since diagnosed RFI-contaminated; superseded by the merged 2L window campaign (dsa110-FLITS #192) and the owner-approved power-law-PBF model change (spec locked 2026-07-17) with pooled production refits pending. Resubmission bar: regenerate at submodule-pin parity (5fb387e or later) from the post-refit products. ADDITIONALLY, dropped from the paper: not sufficiently informative, and Oran is no longer the sole CHIME-data scintillation example after the 2L campaign re-analysis (zach and chromatica 4/4, freya resurrected, whitney two-scale candidate). Do not resubmit as a manuscript figure.

required_provenance: frozen real-background injection configuration
injection recovery and off-pulse null results
fit-window and low-lag stability
reported interval convention and center frequency
